# Nordelta Build

## Overview
Nordelta Build is a community of tech founders, developers, and makers located in Nordelta and the north zone of Greater Buenos Aires. Founded in 2025, the goal is to build the tech ecosystem of the area from the ground up.

## Key Features
- **Startups & Projects:** Connecting founders with co-founders, early hires, and first users.
- **Knowledge:** Technical workshops, founder talks, and Q&A sessions.
- **Network:** Access to investors, mentors, and corporations in the northern zone.
- **Action:** An active community building real projects together.

## Upcoming Events
- **Kick-off Nordelta Build:** The first community gathering (Date & Location TBD).
- **Build with AI Workshop:** Vibe coding session from idea to MVP.
- **Nordelta Hack #1:** The first hackathon of the community.

## Foundation
Started by ~40 founding members.
Main contact: WhatsApp +54 11 2508-5500.

## Call to Action
Join the community to start building the future of tech in Nordelta.
